description: CompositionPurple strap top made of 100% polyester, mid-thigh length, sleeveless with adjustable jeweled shoulder straps, loose shape with elasticated smocking to define waist, three rows of frills and short button placket at front top, mother-of-pearl buttons, top back is gathered to elasticated edging at topFit RegularWash careMachine wash on delicate cycle or dry cleanNo not bleach Do not tumble dryCool ironThe polyester fabric used for this funky top has a silky luster and when combined with the purple jewels on the shoulder straps, this dress becomes a great party-wear option. Kept young and fresh with it's short length and loose top, you could wear this over smart jeans or with sheer stockings and heels to dress it up.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5.8" and chest 33"
